task_description: Fix test recording and run screenshots to be saved per repository instead of shared directory

patterns.repository_selection: Pages use getSelectedRepository() to get the active GitHub repo
patterns.path_construction: Use path.join() for cross-platform path building (see src/lib/db/index.ts)
patterns.directory_creation: Use fs.mkdirSync with recursive: true to ensure parent directories exist
patterns.singleton_pattern: Recorder and Runner use singleton instances via getRecorder() and getRunner()

existing_implementations.description: Screenshots currently saved to hardcoded ./public/screenshots directory
